    Index

    A B C D E F G H I K L M N O P R S T U V W X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addNewTableDesignSubwindow(Table) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Adds a new TableDesignSubwindow for the specified table.
    addNewTableRowsSubwindow(Table) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Adds a new TableRowsSubwindow based on the currently selected table, if the current subwindow is a TableSubwindow and a table is selected.
    addNewTableSubwindow() - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Adds a new TableSubwindow to the manager.
    addObserver(ColumnRepositoryObserver) - Method in class domain.ColumnRepository
    Registers an observer to be notified when a column changes.
    addValue(String) - Method in class domain.Row
    Adds a new value to the end of the row.
    allowsBlanks(int) - Method in class domain.ColumnRepository
    Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the specified index.
    allowsBlanks(int) - Method in class ui.editors.RowValueAccess
     
    allowsBlanks(Column) - Method in class ui.editors.ColumnDefaultValueAccess
     
    applyResize(Subwindow.ResizeZone, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.Subwindow
    Applies a resize to the subwindow based on the given zone and delta values.
    applyScroll(Graphics, Rectangle) - Method in class ui.ScrollablePanel
     

    B

    blockEditing() - Method in class ui.TableDesignSubwindow

    Returns true if editing should be blocked (due to invalid name input).

    bringToFront(Subwindow) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Moves a subwindow to the front (end of the list).

    closeSubwindow(Subwindow) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Removes the given subwindow from the list of managed subwindows.
    Column - Class in domain
    Represents a column in a table, including its name, type, blank-value policy, and default value.

    Constructs a new Column with the given name.
    COLUMN_WIDTH - Static variable in class ui.UIConstants
     
    columnAllowsBlanks(int) - Method in class domain.Table
    Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the given index.

    Returns whether the column at the given index allows blanks.

    Creates a new ColumnsController for a given table.

    Returns the list of columns from the table.
    columnsRequest() - Method in class ui.controllers.RowsController
    Returns the list of columns from the table.

    ColumnTypeValidator - Class in domain
    Utility class to validate if a column's current type is compatible with all existing row values and the default value.

    copy() - Method in class domain.Table
    Returns a copy of the table with the same name.
    createNewColumn() - Method in class domain.ColumnRepository
    Creates a new column with a unique name and adds it to the list.
    createNewColumn() - Method in class domain.Table
    Creates a new column and adds a default value to every existing row.
    createNewRow() - Method in class domain.Table
    Creates a new row using the current columns' default values and adds it to the table.
    createNewTable() - Method in class domain.TableRepository
    Creates a new table with a unique name and adds it to the repository.
    createNewTableDesignSubwindow(Table) - Method in class ui.SubwindowFactory
    Creates a new TableDesignSubwindow for the given table.
    createNewTableRowsSubwindow(Table) - Method in class ui.SubwindowFactory
    Creates a new TableRowsSubwindow for the given table.
    createNewTableSubwindow() - Method in class ui.SubwindowFactory
    Creates a new TableSubwindow with a fresh TableRepository.

    Draws this subwindow.

    Draws the subwindow, including the title bar, close button, and column rows.

    Draws the contents of the subwindow including headers, rows, and the UI elements.

    H

    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.CloseButtonStrategy
    Handles the mouse click to close the window.
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.DragStrategy
    Handles dragging behavior for a Subwindow.
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.EditAnySubwindowStrategy
     
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in interface ui.interaction.MouseInteractionStrategy
     
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.OpenTableStrategy
    Handles the mouse event to open a new TableDesignSubwindow if the user double-clicked a valid table row.
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.ResizeStrategy
    Handles the mouse event for resizing a subwindow.
    handle(SubwindowManager, Subwindow, int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.ScrollInteractionStrategy
     
    handleCreateNewColumnRequest() - Method in class ui.controllers.ColumnsController
    Requests the table to create a new column.
    handleCreateNewRowRequest() - Method in class ui.controllers.RowsController
    Requests the creation of a new row in the table.
    handleCreateNewTableRequest() - Method in class ui.controllers.TablesController
    Requests the creation of a new table in the repository.
    handleDeleteColumnRequest(Column) - Method in class ui.controllers.ColumnsController
    Requests the removal of a column from the table.
    handleDeleteRowRequest(Row) - Method in class ui.controllers.RowsController
    Deletes the specified row from the table.
    handleDeleteTableRequest(Table) - Method in class ui.controllers.TablesController
    Removes the specified table from the repository.
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.CanvasWindow
    Called when the user presses a key (id == KeyEvent.KEY_PRESSED) or enters a character (id == KeyEvent.KEY_TYPED).
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.editors.ColumnDefaultValueEditor
     
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.editors.NameEditor
     
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.editors.RowValueEditor
     
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.MainWindow
     
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.Subwindow
    Handles a key event sent to this subwindow.
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Handles key input events and delegates them to the topmost subwindow.
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.TableDesignSubwindow
    Handles key input such as deletion or editing.
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.TableRowsSubwindow
    Handles key events like deletion of a row.
    handleKeyEvent(int, int, char) - Method in class ui.TableSubwindow
     
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.CanvasWindow
    Called when the user presses (id == MouseEvent.MOUSE_PRESSED), releases (id == MouseEvent.MOUSE_RELEASED), or drags (id == MouseEvent.MOUSE_DRAGGED) the mouse.
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.MainWindow
     
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.Subwindow
     
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.SubwindowManager
    Handles mouse events by delegating to an appropriate interaction strategy.
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.TableDesignSubwindow
    Handles mouse events within the subwindow.
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.TableRowsSubwindow
    Handles mouse interactions for row selection, editing, and row creation.
    handleMouseEvent(int, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.TableSubwindow

    Subwindow - Class in ui
    Abstract base class for all types of subwindows in the UI.
    Subwindow(int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class ui.Subwindow
    Creates a new subwindow with given bounds and title.
    Subwindow.ResizeZone - Enum Class in ui
    Enum representing the 9 zones that can be used to resize a subwindow.
    SubwindowFactory - Class in ui
    Factory class responsible for creating all types of subwindows in a consistent manner.
    SubwindowFactory() - Constructor for class ui.SubwindowFactory
     
    SubwindowManager - Class in ui
     
    SubwindowManager() - Constructor for class ui.SubwindowManager
    Initializes a SubwindowManager with a default SubwindowFactory and sets up key command mappings.

    T

    Table - Class in domain
    Represents a table, containing a list of columns and rows.
    Table(String) - Constructor for class domain.Table
    Constructs a new Table with the given name.
    TableDesignSubwindow - Class in ui
    A subwindow that provides an interface to edit the structure (columns) of a table.
    TableDesignSubwindow(int, int, int, int, String, Table) - Constructor for class ui.TableDesignSubwindow
    Constructs a TableDesignSubwindow with the given parameters.
    TableNameAccess - Class in ui.editors
     
    TableNameAccess(TablesController) - Constructor for class ui.editors.TableNameAccess
     
    TableRepository - Class in domain
    Repository for managing multiple tables.
    TableRepository() - Constructor for class domain.TableRepository
     
    TableRowsSubwindow - Class in ui
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of rows in a table.
    TableRowsSubwindow(int, int, int, int, String, Table) - Constructor for class ui.TableRowsSubwindow
    Constructs a new TableRowsSubwindow.
    TablesController - Class in ui.controllers
    Controller for managing operations on tables through the TableRepository.
    TablesController(TableRepository) - Constructor for class ui.controllers.TablesController
    Constructs a TablesController using the given repository.
    tablesRequest() - Method in class ui.controllers.TablesController
    Returns all tables managed by the repository.
    TableSubwindow - Class in ui
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of tables in a TableRepository.
    TableSubwindow(int, int, int, int, String, TableRepository) - Constructor for class ui.TableSubwindow
    Constructs a new TableSubwindow with the given position, size, and table repository.
    title - Variable in class ui.Subwindow
     
    TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT - Static variable in class ui.UIConstants
     
    toggleBlanksAllowed(Column) - Method in class ui.controllers.ColumnsController
    Toggles whether blanks are allowed for the given column.
    toggleDefaultValue(String, Column) - Method in class ui.controllers.ColumnsController
    Sets the defaultvalue of the given column.
    toggleValue(Row, int, String) - Method in class ui.controllers.RowsController
    Toggles the value of a boolean column in the specified row.
    TOP - Enum constant in enum class ui.Subwindow.ResizeZone
     
    TOP_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class ui.Subwindow.ResizeZone
     
    TOP_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class ui.Subwindow.ResizeZone
     
    TYPE_AREA_WIDTH - Static variable in class ui.UIConstants
     
    typeRequest(int) - Method in class ui.controllers.RowsController
    Returns the type of the column at the given index.

    U

    ui - package ui
     
    ui.controllers - package ui.controllers
     
    ui.editors - package ui.editors
     
    ui.interaction - package ui.interaction
     
    UIConstants - Class in ui
     
    update(int, int) - Method in class ui.Scrollbar
     
    updateTableName(Table, String) - Method in class domain.TableRepository
    Updates the name of the given table if the new name is valid.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class domain.ColumnType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ui.Subwindow.ResizeZone
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class domain.ColumnType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class ui.Subwindow.ResizeZone
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.CloseButtonStrategy
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the event.
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.DragStrategy
    Determines whether this strategy should handle the given mouse event.
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.EditAnySubwindowStrategy
     
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in interface ui.interaction.MouseInteractionStrategy
     
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.OpenTableStrategy
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the given mouse interaction.
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.ResizeStrategy
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the mouse interaction at the specified coordinates.
    wantsToHandle(Subwindow, int, int, int) - Method in class ui.interaction.ScrollInteractionStrategy
     
    width - Variable in class ui.Subwindow
     
    WIDTH_TYPE_CLICK - Static variable in class ui.UIConstants
